description: Fetch the agonist-bound (1ERE) and antagonist-bound (1ERR) structures of Estrogen Receptor alpha. Focus your analysis and alignment exclusively on Chain A for both structures (you may remove or hide other chains/peptides). Align the antagonist structure (1ERR) to the agonist structure (1ERE). Locate the C-terminal Helix 12 (spanning roughly residues 538-548). Quantify the massive conformational shift by measuring the distance between the alpha-carbon (CA) of Aspartate 545 (Asp545) in the 1ERE structure and the corresponding Asp545 CA in the 1ERR structure. Create a publication-quality figure that illustrates the mechanism: show the aligned protein backbones, highlight Helix 12 in two contrasting colors, and display the tamoxifen ligand (residue name OHT) as sticks. Save the figure to '/home/ga/PyMOL_Data/images/er_helix12_shift.png'. Write a structural report to '/home/ga/PyMOL_Data/er_antagonism_report.txt' containing the ligand names (EST and OHT), mentioning Helix 12, and reporting the measured Asp545 CA displacement distance in Angstroms.
